prompt: Generate a standup from developer notes about a production outage fix and upcoming Stripe/Pinecone work. Should include Yesterday, Today, and Blockers sections.

assertions.name: has_three_sections
assertions.description: Output contains Yesterday, Today, and Blockers sections

assertions.name: summarizes_not_dumps
assertions.description: Output is reasonably concise (under ~600 characters total)

assertions.name: mentions_stripe
assertions.description: Today section mentions Stripe or Pro tier

assertions.name: has_date_or_header
assertions.description: Output has a standup header or date
